# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: frontend
  port: 8080

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-authz
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
    kind: Server
    name: frontend-server
    namespace: my-namespace
  authorizationPolicy:
    port:
      8080:
        action: ALLOW
        rules:
          - from:
              sourceNamespace: my-namespace
              sourceWorkloadSelector:
                labels:
                  app: backend
            to:
              destinationPort: 8081

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-authz
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
    kind: Server
    name: backend-server
    namespace: my-namespace
  authorizationPolicy:
    port:
      8081:
        action: ALLOW
        rules:
          - from:
              sourceNamespace: my-namespace
              sourceWorkloadSelector:
                labels:
                  app: frontend
            to:
              destinationPort: 8080
